title: Exponents
claim: Exponents represent repeated multiplication of a quantity by itself or structured scaling relations.

proof_layers.intuitive_explanation: aⁿ represents multiplying a by itself n times.
proof_layers.formal_or_structural_proof: aⁿ represents multiplying a by itself n times.
proof_layers.empirical_or_reconstruction_basis: Reconstructable with simple objects, marks, measurement, or geometric construction depending on the truth.
proof_layers.validation_assessment: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
